items.title: Purpose Investments Inc. Announces November 2025 Distributions
items.description: TORONTO, Nov. 18, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Purpose Investments Inc. (“Purpose”) is pleased to announce distributions for the month of November 2025 for its open-end exchange-traded funds and closed-end funds (“the Funds”). The ex-distribution date for all Open-End Funds is November 26, 2025. The ex-distribution date for all closed-end funds is November 28, 2025. items.title: Stocks Are Getting Slammed Again. This Isn’t the Time to Panic.
items.description: The latest market sell-off is another sign of tech/AI froth. But there are other pockets of the market that still look attractive.

items.title: Apple (AAPL) Valuation: Is There More Upside After Recent Gains?
items.description: Apple (AAPL) stock has moved slightly over the past week, showing a small decline but maintaining gains from the previous month. With no major events steering the market, investors are now focused on recent performance trends. See our latest analysis for Apple. Apple’s latest share price has settled at $267.46 after a modest pullback this week, though the stock still boasts impressive momentum. items.title: Apple Is Apparently Getting Ready to Replace CEO Tim Cook. Is That Good News for AAPL Stock?
items.description: Apple is apparently accelerating its plans to replace Cook amid concerns that the company is falling behind in AI.

items.title: Wall Street slumps on AI bubble fears
items.description: Wall Street stocks slumped on Tuesday amid continued concerns about a possible AI bubble.
